name: Baseline Hearing Tests for Utah New Employees

mainEntity.name: What baseline audiogram requirements apply for new hires in Sandy, Utah plants?
mainEntity.text: What baseline audiogram requirements apply for new hires in Sandy, Utah plants?

acceptedAnswer.text: OSHA mandates baseline audiograms within 6 months of first 85 dB exposure for all included employees, establishing pre-employment hearing levels for future claims.

suggestedAnswer.text: New Sandy manufacturing hires get baselines to measure shifts against. Employers delaying tests weaken defenses later. Workers: insist on testing, keep copies. Disputes arise over 'revised baselines' if poor initial fit. Legal review prevents employer manipulation in comp litigation.[2]
